name: B-b-q Meatballs & Smokies (Great)
recipeInstructions:
~-------------------------------B-B-Q SAUCE--------------------------------
16 oz Tomato sauce
1/4 cup butter
1 medium onion, chopped
1/2 cup brown sugar
1/2 cup catsup
3 tablespoons barbecue spice
5 tablespoons Worcestershire sauce
2 tablespoons vinegar
10 dashes hot sauce
2 teaspoons liquid smoke
1 1/2 cups chili sauce
Combine the hamburger and the next 12 ingredients. Shape into small meatballs and saute until done. Set aside.
Combine the sauce ingredients and cook until thick.
Combine the sauce, meatballs, and smokie links.
